title: Fiery Chicken-less Noodle Soup
summary: This hot and spicy pastina soup is the perfect home remedy for a cold, with scotch bonnet chilli to clear your sinuses and ginger and turmeric to boost your immune system. It’s chicken-less soup for the soul, and the sore throat.

method.description: Peel and finely dice the carrots (you can also coarsely grate them). Bash the ginger and turmeric. Poke a few holes in the scotch bonnet.

Heat the chicken stock, thyme, scotch bonnet, turmeric and ginger in a medium saucepan over a medium heat. Season very generously with freshly cracked black pepper. Let it come to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 mins.
Cook the carrots and pastina in the broth following the pastina packet instructions (about 4-5 mins).

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
